arts.ttl: Parma vs. Lecce: a crucial match
arts.sum: Parma have won only one of their last eight league matches (D2 L5), conceding 17 goals and scoring just eight; over the last eight matchdays in Serie A (from MD15), only Monza (3) have won fewer points than the Emilians (5, level with Empoli) while only Lecce (18) have conceded more goals than Parma (17) in the competition. After their success in their last home match against Lecce in Serie A (2-0 on 13 January 2020, with goals scored by Simone Iacoponi and Andreas Cornelius), Parma could keep a clean sheet in two home games in a row against the Salento team for only the second time (the first one was between January 1991 and September 1993, in their first two home matches against the Giallorossi).

Parma were so close to a rare league double over AC Milan last week, but ended up conceding a late comeback defeat against the Rossoneri. Lecce will be hoping for a better outcome than their 4-0 defe...

arts.sum: Patrick Dorgu is set to become Ruben Amorim's first Manchester United signing, but the Premier League club's pursuit of the Lecce and Denmark star has run into some delays

arts.sum: Manchester United’s soon-to-be signing, Patrick Dorgu, is a “powerhouse on the pitch”. That’s according to his Denmark U21s coach, Steffen Hojer anyway, who spoke to Tipsbladet about the highly-rated wing-back. arts.sum: As the Serie A relegation battle intensifies, Parma and Lecce prepare for a pivotal Friday night clash at Stadio Tardini. Both teams, reeling from defeats against Milan giants last week, find themselves in desperate need of points to escape the drop zone.
